title: にんじん……買ってくださいっ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After doing some shopping downtown, I start
making my way back home.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Carrots... G-get your carrots here... Delicious... carrots...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wha?! O-oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... The grocer is a friend of mine...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the store is short-staffed, so I offered
to help...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But I really messed up when I was ordering more stock and mistyped the number of units we needed... by two whole digits. Sob...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what I'm going to do with all these
carrots...
choice_data_list: Let's see if Tracen is interested in taking them.

You'll have better luck hawking carrots where
it's more crowded.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Approved! Tazuna double-checked the numbers,
and this is well within our budget!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Stocking up on our reserves is never a bad thing
and would be a huge help! Please bring them to
the academy at once!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. I would have never thought to ask
the school...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll take them all there now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-hup! Wh-whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, Meisho Doto and I take the huge pile
of carrots to school.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, that makes sense... I'll try my best to get
more people to come...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Carrots... Get your carrots here... Fresh, yummy...
Eep!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Are you all right, dearie?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. Um, would you like some fresh carrots?

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Why, aren't you just the hardest worker? I think I
will have some, yes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Struck by how earnestly Meisho Doto is working
despite her blunder, people passing by begin to
make their way to the store by the dozen.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... Seems like we managed to sell them all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Running around while watching where most
people were headed kind of reminded me of
being in a race...
